canaries.command: deno --version; git --version; node --version; deno task agentic:runtime doctor --json
canaries.expected: Native WSL toolchain responds and runtime doctor returns structured health evidence.
canaries.actual: Version probes succeeded; runtime doctor reported no_change.

canaries.command: Owner procedure: interrupt sleep/network, reopen Claude Remote Control, and resume the same session.
canaries.expected: The same Claude session reconnects after sleep or network interruption.
canaries.actual: Owner accepted reconnect behavior as working; no raw mobile session evidence is fabricated.
residualRisks: Interactive behavior is owner-accepted; automation does not reproduce mobile UI.

evidence.summary: Owner directive records accepted working behavior.

canaries.command: Owner procedure: launch Claude sessions in two isolated worktrees and verify independent resume.
canaries.expected: Multiple Claude sessions remain isolated by worktree and resume independently.
canaries.actual: Owner accepted isolated-session behavior as working; automation does not invent UI evidence.
residualRisks: Interactive behavior is owner-accepted; automation does not reproduce mobile UI.

evidence.summary: Owner directive records accepted working behavior.

canaries.command: deno task agentic:runtime status --agent codex --worktree $WORKTREE --json; deno task agentic:runtime repair codex-remote --worktree $WORKTREE --dry-run --json
canaries.expected: Status and repair inspection are structured; no daemon restart occurs; owner confirms mobile visibility.
canaries.actual: Status and repair dry-run completed without restarting the active daemon; mobile visibility is owner-accepted working.
residualRisks: Interactive behavior is owner-accepted; automation does not reproduce mobile UI.
Daemon restart and rescue were not forced during an active implementation thread.

evidence.summary: Live status exit 3; repair dry-run exit 4; no live repair requested.
